name: Broccoli Beef Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chopped fresh broccoli, cooked crisp-tender
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef and drain. Add mushrooms, 1 1/2 cups cheddar cheese, and onion. Remove from heat and set aside.
2. Combine Bisquick and water to form a soft dough. Add remaining cheese and mix well.
3. Spread dough into a greased 13 x 9-inch baking dish, covering the sides halfway.
4. Cover the dough with the meat mixture and sprinkle broccoli evenly.
5. Pour the remaining ingredients over the top.
6. Bake at 350°F until a knife inserted in the center tests clean, about 35 minutes.
To make Spinach Beef Pie: Use spinach in place of broccoli and Swiss cheese in place of Cheddar.
